Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to answer find a trace that the model permits but domain says invalid

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Tree SEQUENCE of receive order check inventory xor node close order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: xor node has children successful subtree PARALLEL of authorize payment package items ship order and cancel subtree SEQUENCE cancel order close order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus after check inventory we go to xor node either take successful subtree or cancel subtree then after xor node we always execute close order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The model permits sequences receive order check inventory then successful subtree in any order then close order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: successful subtree includes authorize payment package items ship order in any order because of parallel

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Domain expects if inventory sufficient authorize payment then package items then ship order then close order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The models parallel allows any ordering among the three children for example ship order before authorize payment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So a trace like receive order check inventory ship order package items authorize payment close order is permitted

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This violates domain because shipping happens before payment authorization

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: shipping before payment could lead to goods being sent without confirmed payment so it is logically unacceptable in order to cash
